rationale: Both reviews identify the fragile `rfl`-after-`Homeomorph.ext` pattern in `map_one'`/`map_mul'`, but Review 2 also correctly catches the same issue in `instFiberMulAction`'s `one_smul`/`mul_smul` (line 89), which uses `Subtype.ext rfl` with the same definitional-equality dependency — a real additional finding confirmed against the diff.
